root_cause: Node DiskPressure escalated into kubelet eviction
evidence: Disk pressure signal observed before eviction
Eviction event message indicates disk or ephemeral-storage pressure

causes.message: Sustained node disk pressure escalated into kubelet eviction
Pod was evicted after node disk pressure crossed eviction thresholds

pod:disk-evicted-pod: Evicted after node disk pressure was reported
The node was low on resource: ephemeral-storage. Threshold quantity: 2147483648, available: 524288Ki. Container app was using 3Gi, request is 500Mi.
